data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ROYAL HONOUR was beaten at $1.30 on resumption but bumped into a handy one there, still putting good margins on the rest of the field. Happy to give him another chance second up and drawn to sit on speed in what looks a fairly thin race. 5. DOUBT IT'S LOVE wasn't far away on wet ground here last time in an improved effort. She's a big price for exotics. 8. MACCA'S ANGEL resumes for her second campaign having been okay in three runs last time in. She wouldn't surprise. 7. KELLERSLEA is a filly by North Pacific on debut for the Hayes yard who can run well, as can 10. POLAR EYES for the Stokes yard on her home track.","runners":[3,5,8,7,10],"exclusive":false}
